1.1.0.0.added: Initial feature spec for the Addon.

1.2.0.0.added: Introduce a public scripting API  This change centralizes buff/stat logic for easier maintenance and enables direct use from C3 JS Scripting + Update Guide accordingly.

1.3.0.0.added:
- Add Scripting Support 
- Debugger support, shows same properties as the built-in Platform Movement Behavior.

1.4.0.0.added:
- Adds animation-mode.
- knockback conditions/expressions.
- improve robustness of floor/wall detection across collision shapes.
- Debugger properties are editable.
- ACE to overwrite whether character is "on the Floor" (Grounded)

1.4.1.0.added:
- Adds animation-mode.
- knockback conditions/expressions.
- improve robustness of floor/wall detection across collision shapes.
- Debugger properties are editable.
- ACE to overwrite whether character is "on the Floor" (Grounded)

1.4.2.0.changed: Rename the knockback feature to a more general "driven move"

1.4.3.0.added:
- Add wall-coyote support and improve ACE docs/usability hints. 
- Add IsAbilityEnabled to include the new wall Coyote Time.
-
1.4.3.0.fixed: - refine descriptions across many conditions, actions and expressions to provide clearer usage hints

1.5.0.0.added: - Add Actions to Toggle whether character is touching a ceiling.
1.5.0.0.changed: - Knockback, given a more descriptive name to understand its versatility better. "Driven Movement"

1.5.1.0.changed:
- Improve Wall Detection (Slop Tolerance variable actually works)
- The 2-frame grace delays real "fallen off edge" detection (to help mitigate issues from Box2D contact jitters)
1.5.1.0.fixed: - fix landing bounce (atches residual bounce regardless of the Physics behaviour settings)
